nasb.text: Then Samuel said to all Israel, “Behold, I have listened to your voice in all that you said to me and I have appointed a king over you.

esv.text: And Samuel said to all Israel, “Behold, I have obeyed your voice in all that you have said to me and have made a king over you.

cnv.text: 撒母耳對以色列人說：“看哪！我已經聽從了你們向我所說的一切話，為你們立了一個王。

ccb.text: 撒母耳对以色列人说：“看啊，我已照你们的要求为你们立了一个王。
